purpose: First-screen and reusable marketing context for the active role-scoped AI experience: present-tense value, explicit human confirmation and an anonymised public scenario boundary.
forbiddenCapabilities: claims that AI performs autonomous consequential commands
claims that public mode accesses account or real-deal data
external model calls from public mode
automatic or background phone calls without an explicit user action
invented prices, legal conclusions or integration status
guaranteed risk prevention or guaranteed business outcomes
